mission.title: rook: CephFS volumes handling via PVCs (dynamic provisioning)
mission.description: CephFS volumes handling via PVCs (dynamic provisioning). Requested by 37+ users.

steps.title: Check current rook deployment
steps.description:
Verify your rook version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook
helm list -n rook 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working rook installation.

steps.title: Review rook configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant rook configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook
kubectl get configmap -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=rook
```
Per #1115, it'd be interesting if CephFS volumes could be handled by storage classes and PVCs, I think this would make it a lot easier to deploy these volumes to helm charts for instance where people would just need to set the `storageClass` to

steps.title: Apply the fix for CephFS volumes handling via PVCs (dynamic provisioning)
steps.description:
So just to clear something up: **rook/cephfs works just fine via PVCs**, and has done so for approximately ever.

Here's a rook/cephfs PVC I use daily (from parallel workers in a complex jenkins job as it happens):
```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: oe-scratch
 
```yaml
volumes:
- name: mysql-persistent-storage
   persistentVolumeClaim:
      claimName: mysql-pv-claim
   mountOptions: path
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook
kubectl get events -n rook --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "CephFS volumes handling via PVCs (dynamic provisioning)" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: So just to clear something up: **rook/cephfs works just fine via PVCs**, and has done so for approximately ever.
codeSnippets:
volumes:
- name: mysql-persistent-storage
   persistentVolumeClaim:
      claimName: mysql-pv-claim
   mountOptions: path

apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: oe-scratch
  namespace: jenkins
spec:
  accessModes:
  - ReadWriteMany
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      name: oe-scratch
  storageClassName: rook-cephfs

apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolume
metadata:
  labels:
    name: oe-scratch
  name: oe-scratch
spec:
  accessModes:
  - ReadWriteMany
  capacity:
    storage: 200Gi
  flexVolume:
    driver: ceph.rook.io/rook
    fsType: ceph
    options:
      clusterNamespace: rook-ceph
      fsName: ceph-filesystem
  persistentVolumeReclaimPolicy: Recycle
  storageClassName: rook-cephfs

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with rook installed or the issue environment reproducible.
